b2bb2g-mvp.deployment-prep.notes: Added deployment readiness docs, CI quality gate, PR checklist, package scripts, and hardened site URL normalization for sitemap/metadata build.

scope: 20 sample records with images per menu
verification: HTML structure smoke: menu pages render h1/articles/images
b2bb2g-mvp.public-sample-ui-refresh.notes: Browser Playwright render check was unavailable because playwright module is not installed; verified via build, curl route smoke, and server-rendered HTML counts instead. bkit_post_write recommends gap analysis due major UI/sample changes.

scope: top picks and new arrivals rails
subpage sidebar filters and result toolbar
verification: route smoke: representative public routes and sample detail routes 200
b2bb2g-mvp.buykorea-inspired-ui-refresh.notes: Implemented as B2BB2G-specific marketplace UI, not a direct buyKOREA clone. Playwright browser module is not installed, so visual verification used build, curl route smoke, and server-rendered HTML counts.

dashboard-products-student-showcase.summary: Implemented Student Showcase workflow on /dashboard/products. Students can create a showcase draft from approved supplier products, add description/student note, submit for admin review, and see current status/records. Original product creation remains supplier-only.

dashboard-messages-send-fallback-2026-06.summary: Hardened sendMessage to re-check conversation membership/conversation state with service-role fallback before inserting messages, and protected audit logging from masking send failures.
